title: The Unexplored Adventures
description: The Unexplored Adventures is a mod about Prehistoric Adventures that haven't seen before, gather up all  your friends and embark on a journey that hasn't been experienced before
body:
###                           Welcome to The Unexplored Adventures,
this mod offers a new type of adventures by adding new biomes, mobs, structures and items to be discovered, Currently the ingame mobs are Stegosaurus, Torvosaurus, Postosuchus and Coelurus, they are still WIP so they don't offer much. Each mob spawns in different biomes making them uniquely rare, every one of them has a special use for example you can use Stegosaurus for transportation as he is mountable, Torvosaurus can be a great fellow friend in hunting as he can track and take down large prey etc New structure also have something special to offer as they have one of the most useful loots in whole game but they are rare aswell making it the perfect target to adventure for, items on the otherhand mostly can be crafted by the player and are not that rare, they all serve a use, Some can be used on dinosaurs some can be used on the other elements of the mod. In the future we will constantly add more and more features to the mod, to see them before being added in the mod please join the discord server, the link is below  
                            This Mod Requires Geckolib
